attributes.action: No confidence in Labours ability to govern. Go to a General Election
attributes.additional_details: This Labour government does not have the skillset or experience to do the jobs they have been given. The Prime Minister has proven himself inadequate as have all of the ministers he has selected. The British public will not forgive that you appointed somebody so closely linked to paedophilia and fraudulent activity. They will also not forgive that not one of the Labour MP's or Labour staff spoke out against this appointment. That proves not one of you has the morals, decency or courage required.
attributes.background: The mandate agreement with the British voters has been broken by this government. The UK wants a general election. This petition is a vote of no confidence from everyone that signs it.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Dissolve Parliament and call a General Election now!
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/750050
